texto: Like a great ship, this season has run aground. Dawn and dusk alternate at an old man's pace. I live alone in an area known as the 'Waterside', writing a book akin to the Revelations of St. John.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ge Fei: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Like a great ship, this season has run aground. Dawn and dusk alternate at an old man's pace. I l…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, memory, revelation pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de revelation e seasons.

texto: Do you mind if I contribute my thoughts to this one? If you could just stop nitpicking and dissecting every little thing, if you could learn to keep one eye closed and one eye open, and quit worrying about everything, you might discover life is pretty fucking beautiful. Am I right?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ge Fei que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Do you mind if I contribute my thoughts to this one? If you could just stop nitpicking and dissec…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, vida, life-philosophy, com foco em life-philosophy.

texto: But how could a mafioso be forced to commit suicide?" I continued. It only goes to show," she said, " that there are forces in this society more terrifying than the mafia. Ding Caichen was no match for them." As to what those " terrifying forces" might be, I couldn't begin to imagine.
